name: Abandoning Honor
text:
This province gets +2 strength while you have a Fire role.
Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a dishonored character – discard that character.

name: Hiruma Kogoe
text:
Sincerity.
Reaction: After the draw phase begins, if you have lower honor than an opponent – look at the top 3 cards of your conflict deck and put them back in any order.

name: Sadane Student
text: This character gets +2[pol] while you have claimed the [air] or [fire] ring.

name: Master Alchemist
text: Action: During a conflict, spend 1 fate to the [fire] ring. Choose a character – honor or dishonor that character.

name: The Wrath of the Kami
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Action: During a conflict at this province, lose 1 honor – this province gets +1 strength until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)

name: Ikoma Ikehata
text:
Covert.
Reaction: After this character wins a [pol] conflict, choose a character you control – honor that character. Draw 1 card.

name: Ancestral Armory
text: Action: Sacrifice this holding, choose a Weapon attachment in your discard pile – return that attachment to your hand.

name: Chikai Order Protector
text: While this character is defending, if you control a participating Courtier or Shugenja character, this character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution.

name: Soshi Shiori
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict, choose a player – that player loses 1 honor. (Unlimited.)

name: Battle Maiden Recruit
text: This character gets +2[mil] while you have claimed the [water] or [void] ring.

name: Wicked Tetsubō
text:
Attach to a Berserker character. Restricted.
Action: During a conflict in which attached character is attacking, choose a defending character and select either [mil] or [pol] – set that character's selected skill to 0 until the end of the conflict.

name: Icon of Favor
text:
Fire role only.
While you have the Imperial Favor, attached character gets +1 glory.
Reaction: After you win a [fire] conflict – honor attached character.

name: Insult to Injury
text: Reaction: After a Duelist character you control wins a duel – dishonor the losing character.

name: Smoke
text: Action: While attached character is participating in a conflict, bow and sacrifice this attachment – until the end of the conflict, each non-unique participating character gets -2[mil].

name: Jurōjin's Curse
text:
Void role only.
Forced Interrupt: When the fate phase ends, if attached character is ready – resolve a second fate phase after this one. (Max 1 per round.)

name: Infiltrator
text:
Play only if the bid on your honor dial is higher than an opponent's.
Action: During a conflict, look at the top card of an opponent's conflict deck – either immediately play that card as if it were in your hand or discard it.

name: Shiksha Scout
text: While this character is participating in a conflict, you are considered to control an additional character in this conflict.

name: Invocation of Ash
text: Action: Lose 1 honor. Choose a character you control – move this attachment to that character. Then, remove 1 fate from that character.

name: Breach of Etiquette
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict – until the end of the conflict, each time a player triggers an ability on a non-Courtier character, he or she loses 1 honor. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Mantis Seafarer
text:
Air role only.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, lose 1 honor – gain 1 fate. (Unlimited.)
